Will Vajpayee be the next PM? -
Wednesday, 21 January , 2004, 14:53
Election 2004 can commence anytime by end of April or in the month of May, and
people are curious to know the outcome. Few important questions that most people
expect at this juncture is… who will be India’s next PM?! Will Atal Bihari Vajpayee
continue to be India’s PM? Will BJP once again win the elections? And what are
Sonia’s chances of becoming India’s next PM?
Our astrologer K Gopalakrishnan analyses the chart of 2 prominent players whose
destiny will decide India’s future!
The Italian born Sonia Gandhi, from the Nehru dynasty is the age-old formula of
Congress, who has enough people against her due to her nationality issues.
A B Vajpayee is a veteran. He has attained the dream of every politician - becoming a
